The '''Gungan shield generator''' was a two-part device used to generate protective [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] around a large segment of a battlefield. Presumably, like the [[Gungan personal energy shield/Legends|Gungan personal energy shield]], it had the same basis as other [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] technology. The force field created by this device was capable of deflecting energy weapons, including shots from [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AATs]], projectiles, and other small objects, but could be breached by infantry. These generators were usually brought to battle by large war beasts such as [[Fambaa/Legends|fambaas]]. These generators provided excellent protection for the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]] during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]] until they were disabled by [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] infantry.
